sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 8.20 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.8)

statement.latex: What is the cardinality of the set of all varieties covering an abelian (nilpotent? Cross? hereditarily finitely based?) variety of groups? The question is related to 4.46 and 4.73. { Yu.\,G.\,Kleiman} There are continually many varieties covering the variety$A$of abelian groups, as well as the variety$A_n$of abelian groups of sufficiently large odd exponent$n$(P.\,A.\,Kozhevnikov, { On varieties ...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
